forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers near the eastern border, high chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the southwest in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 23.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Heavy falls possible. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely at night. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Heavy falls possible. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Heavy falls possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Heavy falls possible from the late morning. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 21.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon then tending northwest to southwesterly in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 28.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog about the Gammon Ranges. Slight chance of a shower south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
